Examples.Title: Get number of collections
Examples.Description: Returns the total number of collections in a database.
Examples.Code:
### Get number of collections
# @name count_collections
GET {{host}}/api/v2/tenants/{{tenant}}/databases/{{database}}/collections_count
x-chroma-token: {{api_key}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Count of collections
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Server error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Create collection
Examples.Description: Creates a new collection in a database.
Examples.Code:
### Create collection
# @name create_collection
POST {{host}}/api/v2/tenants/{{tenant}}/databases/{{database}}/collections
x-chroma-token: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "configuration": null,
  "get_or_create": false,
  "metadata": {
    "key": "value"
  },
  "name": "my_collection",
  "schema": null
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Collection created successfully
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Server error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Delete collection
Examples.Description: Deletes a collection in a database.
Examples.Code:
### Delete collection
# @name delete_collection
DELETE {{host}}/api/v2/tenants/{{tenant}}/databases/{{database}}/collections/{{collection_id}}
x-chroma-token: {{api_key}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Collection deleted successfully
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Collection not found
# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Server error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Fork collection
Examples.Description: Creates a fork of an existing collection.
Examples.Code:
### Fork collection
# @name fork_collection
POST {{host}}/api/v2/tenants/{{tenant}}/databases/{{database}}/collections/{{collection_id}}/fork
x-chroma-token: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "new_name": "string"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Collection forked successfully
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Collection not found
# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Server error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get fork count
Examples.Description: Returns the number of forks for a collection.
Examples.Code:
### Get fork count
# @name fork_count
GET {{host}}/api/v2/tenants/{{tenant}}/databases/{{database}}/collections/{{collection_id}}/fork_count
x-chroma-token: {{api_key}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Fork count retrieved successfully
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Collection not found
# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Server error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get collection
Examples.Description: Returns a collection by ID or name.
Examples.Code:
### Get collection
# @name get_collection
GET {{host}}/api/v2/tenants/{{tenant}}/databases/{{database}}/collections/{{collection_id}}
x-chroma-token: {{api_key}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Collection found
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Collection not found
# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Server error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: List collections
Examples.Description: Lists all collections in a database.
Examples.Code:
### List collections
# @name list_collections
GET {{host}}/api/v2/tenants/{{tenant}}/databases/{{database}}/collections?limit=10&offset=0
x-chroma-token: {{api_key}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: List of collections
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Server error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Update collection
Examples.Description: Updates an existing collection's name or metadata.
Examples.Code:
### Update collection
# @name update_collection
PUT {{host}}/api/v2/tenants/{{tenant}}/databases/{{database}}/collections/{{collection_id}}
x-chroma-token: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "new_configuration": null,
  "new_metadata": {
    "key": "value"
  },
  "new_name": "updated_collection_name"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Collection updated successfully
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Collection not found
# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Server error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Delete database

### Delete database
# @name delete_database
DELETE {{host}}/api/v2/tenants/{{tenant}}/databases/{{database}}
x-chroma-token: {{api_key}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Database deleted successfully
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Database not found
# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Server error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get database
Examples.Description: Returns a database by name.
Examples.Code:
### Get database
# @name get_database
GET {{host}}/api/v2/tenants/{{tenant}}/databases/{{database}}
x-chroma-token: {{api_key}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses

# 401

Examples.Title: List databases
Examples.Description: Lists all databases for a tenant.
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using Chroma;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Attach function
Examples.Description: Attaches a function to a collection.
Examples.Code:
### Attach function
# @name attach_function
POST {{host}}/api/v2/tenants/{{tenant}}/databases/{{database}}/collections/{{collection_id}}/functions/attach
x-chroma-token: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "function_id": "1e30d217-3d78-4f8c-b244-79381dc6a254",
  "name": "my_function",
  "output_collection": "output_collection_name",
  "params": {}
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description:  Function attached successfully
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Server error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Detach function
Examples.Description: Detaches a function from a collection.
Examples.Code:
### Detach function
# @name detach_function
POST {{host}}/api/v2/tenants/{{tenant}}/databases/{{database}}/collections/{{collection_id}}/attached_functions/{{name}}/detach
x-chroma-token: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "delete_output": true
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Function detached successfully
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Server error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get attached function
Examples.Description: Returns an attached function by name.
Examples.Code:
### Get attached function
# @name get_attached_function
GET {{host}}/api/v2/tenants/{{tenant}}/databases/{{database}}/collections/{{collection_id}}/functions/{{function_name}}
x-chroma-token: {{api_key}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Attached function retrieved successfully
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Attached function not found
# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Server error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Add records
Examples.Description: Adds records to a collection.
Examples.Code:
### Add records
# @name collection_add
POST {{host}}/api/v2/tenants/{{tenant}}/databases/{{database}}/collections/{{collection_id}}/add
x-chroma-token: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "documents": [
    "string"
  ],
  "embeddings": [
    [
      0
    ]
  ],
  "ids": [
    "string"
  ],
  "metadatas": [
    "string"
  ],
  "uris": [
    "string"
  ]
}

## Responses
# 201
# Description: Collection added successfully
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Invalid data for collection addition

Examples.Title: Get number of records
Examples.Description: Returns the number of records in a collection.
Examples.Code:
### Get number of records
# @name collection_count
GET {{host}}/api/v2/tenants/{{tenant}}/databases/{{database}}/collections/{{collection_id}}/count?read_level=index_and_wal
x-chroma-token: {{api_key}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Number of records in the collection
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Collection not found
# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Server error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Delete records
Examples.Description: Deletes records in a collection. Can filter by IDs or metadata.
Examples.Code:
### Delete records
# @name collection_delete
POST {{host}}/api/v2/tenants/{{tenant}}/databases/{{database}}/collections/{{collection_id}}/delete
x-chroma-token: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "where": "string",
  "where_document": "string",
  "ids": [
    "string"
  ],
  "limit": 0
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Records deleted successfully
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Collection not found
# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Server error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get records
Examples.Description: Returns records from a collection by ID or metadata filter.
Examples.Code:
### Get records
# @name collection_get
POST {{host}}/api/v2/tenants/{{tenant}}/databases/{{database}}/collections/{{collection_id}}/get
x-chroma-token: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "where": "string",
  "where_document": "string",
  "ids": [
    "string"
  ],
  "include": [
    "distances"
  ],
  "limit": 0,
  "offset": 0
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Records retrieved from the collection
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Collection not found
# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Server error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Query collection
Examples.Description: Queries a collection using dense vector search with metadata and full-text search filtering.
Examples.Code:
### Query collection
# @name collection_query
POST {{host}}/api/v2/tenants/{{tenant}}/databases/{{database}}/collections/{{collection_id}}/query?limit=10&offset=0
x-chroma-token: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "include": [
    "documents",
    "metadatas",
    "distances"
  ],
  "n_results": 10,
  "query_embeddings": [
    [
      0.1,
      0.2,
      0.3
    ]
  ]
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Records matching the query
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Collection not found
# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Server error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Search records
Examples.Description: Searches records from a collection with dense, sparse, or hybrid vector search.
Examples.Code:
### Search records
# @name collection_search
POST {{host}}/api/v2/tenants/{{tenant}}/databases/{{database}}/collections/{{collection_id}}/search
x-chroma-token: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "read_level": "IndexAndWal",
  "searches": [
    {
      "n_results": 10,
      "query_embeddings": [
        [
          0.1,
          0.2,
          0.3
        ]
      ]
    }
  ]
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Records searched from the collection
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Collection not found
# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Server error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Update records
Examples.Description: Updates records in a collection by ID.
Examples.Code:
### Update records
# @name collection_update
POST {{host}}/api/v2/tenants/{{tenant}}/databases/{{database}}/collections/{{collection_id}}/update
x-chroma-token: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "documents": [
    "string"
  ],
  "embeddings": "string",
  "ids": [
    "string"
  ],
  "metadatas": [
    "string"
  ],
  "uris": [
    "string"
  ]
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Collection updated successfully
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Collection not found

Examples.Title: Upsert records
Examples.Description: Upserts records in a collection (create if not exists, otherwise update).
Examples.Code:
### Upsert records
# @name collection_upsert
POST {{host}}/api/v2/tenants/{{tenant}}/databases/{{database}}/collections/{{collection_id}}/upsert
x-chroma-token: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "documents": [
    "string"
  ],
  "embeddings": [
    [
      0
    ]
  ],
  "ids": [
    "string"
  ],
  "metadatas": [
    "string"
  ],
  "uris": [
    "string"
  ]
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Records upserted successfully
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Collection not found
# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Server error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get tenant
Examples.Description: Returns an existing tenant by name.
Examples.Code:
### Get tenant
# @name get_tenant
GET {{host}}/api/v2/tenants/{{tenant_name}}
x-chroma-token: {{api_key}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Tenant found
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Tenant not found
# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Server error
# Content-Type: application/json
